title: arthraxon mollis
intro: Arthraxon mollis, also known as flat-stemmed hairgrass or Chinese hairgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to relieve various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Arthraxon mollis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Arthraxon mollis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and supplements for its medicinal and health benefits.
